text:
First, note that in 1494, time zones as we know them did not exist. However, for the purpose of this exercise, we assume modern time zone offsets applied retroactively.

Asia/Tokyo is UTC+9.
Asia/Riyadh is UTC+3.

Difference: Riyadh is 6 hours behind Tokyo (3 - 9 = -6).

6 PM Tokyo = 18:00 Tokyo time.
Subtract 6 hours: 18:00 - 6 hours = 12:00 (same date).

Date remains November 3, 1494.

FINAL_ANSWER: 1494-11-03 12:00
